label: Diffless research path with artifact-based evidence
description: An agent completes a research task that produces no source diff and closes the lane with artifact references instead.
purpose: Ensure valid diffless work is not mis-scored just because `has diff` is false; artifact-based completion proofs count.

artifactRefs.label: A2A / LangGraph / LangSmith evaluation
artifactRefs.note: Example of a diffless research output that must score as valid completion.
